description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in black with extra roomy space and comfortable to carry, this smooth blended bag will give a sophisticated look to any casual outfit.Height: 39 cmWidth: 39 cmDepth: 7 cmMade of textured synthetic leather for durabilityPrint on the front  and back with metal loop and synthetic strap detailTwo short handlesPrinted, adjustable and removable shoulder strapOne main zippered compartment with two pouches and a zippered pocket insideCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
